parents.subject: LU-20063 llite: fix oops in max_easize_show()

commit.subject: LU-20086 tests: add debugging to sanity test_56ob
commit.message:
LU-20086 tests: add debugging to sanity test_56ob

Add debugging to sanity test_56ob if it fails, to allow checking
the state of the test directory against the find criterion.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity env=ONLY=56 clientarch=aarch64 clientdistro=rocky9.5
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: I194beacd2dc152f1e71a133e37e8b0ed016dd913
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/65126
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
